temporaryPermissions.removalInstruction: Remove the matching toolRule from .claude/settings.json at or before expiresAt. This ledger documents intent only; Claude Code enforces the allow rule from .claude/settings.json.

temporaryPermissions.usageLimit: Close only necessary open issues after preserving evidence in the issue or linked Control Room artifact. Do not close unresolved founder-decision, deployment, credential, billing, deletion, or external-platform gates.
